title: Internal Auditor
responsibilities: perform audit procedures and control testing; document findings and prepare audit reports; recommend improvements for compliance and risk mitigation
requirements_text: We are looking for a middle specialist with hands-on experience in audit, excel, financial reporting, internal controls, risk assessment. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: BrightLabs is hiring a middle internal auditor to support reviewing financial processes, controls, and compliance activities.
raw_text: Vacancy V087: Internal Auditor at BrightLabs. Location: Kharkiv. Employment: contract. Required experience: 2.6 years. Required skills: audit, excel, financial reporting, internal controls, risk assessment, documentation, process review, compliance. Optional skills: power bi, sox. Responsibilities: perform audit procedures and control testing; document findings and prepare audit reports; recommend improvements for compliance and risk mitigation.
